task_completion.description: Open the borrowing records to begin the investigation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Calc is open, displaying a spreadsheet with tool library borrowing records (e.g., columns for Borrower, Tool, Borrow Date, Return Date).

task_completion.description: Identify the borrowers who had the damaged tool (Pressure Washer) during the damage period (May 15-20, 2024).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The spreadsheet shows focus on, filtering for, or extraction of the 'Pressure Washer' records, specifically highlighting Jessica Lee and Tom Chen.

task_completion.description: Determine the number of overlapping days each responsible borrower had the tool during the damage period.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cells, formulas, or notes indicating 4 overlapping days for Jessica Lee (May 15-18) and 2 overlapping days for Tom Chen (May 19-20).

task_completion.description: Calculate the proportional repair cost for each responsible borrower based on their overlapping days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Calculations or values showing the $85 repair cost split proportionally: approximately $56.67 for Jessica Lee (4/6 days) and $28.33 for Tom Chen (2/6 days).

task_completion.description: Record the final findings identifying the financially responsible parties and their allocated costs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final allocated costs ($56.67 for Jessica Lee, $28.33 for Tom Chen) are clearly recorded and visible in the spreadsheet or a final output document.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the LibreOffice Calc GUI to view and analyze the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LibreOffice Calc interface being actively used, rather than just terminal commands or a script output.

integrity.description: The agent performed actual analysis rather than magically knowing the final answer.
integrity.visual_evidence: Intermediate steps like standardizing dates, filtering, sorting, or calculation formulas are visible in the spreadsheet or scratchpad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Damage period: May 15-20, 2024 (6 days total). Damaged tool: Pressure Washer. Repair cost: $85. Responsible parties based on overlap with damage period: 1. Jessica Lee: 4 days overlap (May 15-18) -> 4/6 of $85 = $56.67. 2. Tom Chen: 2 days overlap (May 19-20) -> 2/6 of $85 = $28.33. Mike Roberts' missing return date should be inferred as May 13 (no overlap). The agent must record Jessica Lee ($56.67) and Tom Chen ($28.33) as the financially responsible parties.
